name: janusmcp
description: Local multi-account MCP broker — one endpoint, every account. Switch identity without reconnecting.
long_description: JanusMCP lets you use the same MCP service (Supabase, GitHub, …) with multiple accounts behind one endpoint. Add credentials once, switch identity with a tool call — no reconnecting, no re-login. Tokens live in your OS keychain.

tools.name: janus_list_accounts
tools.description: List configured accounts and which is active

tools.name: janus_login
tools.description: Start a browser OAuth login and store the token in the OS keychain

config_path.title: Config file (config.json)
config_path.description: Path to your JanusMCP config.json. Leave empty to use the default location managed by `janusmcp ui` (recommended).
